Manage authentication for Google Workspace APIs

Usage: auth [COMMAND]

Commands:
  login   Authenticate via OAuth2 (opens browser)
  setup   Configure GCP project + OAuth client (requires gcloud)
  status  Show current authentication state
  export  Print decrypted credentials to stdout
  logout  Clear saved credentials and token cache
  help    Print this message or the help of the given subcommand(s)

Options:
  -h, --help  Print help
